about.title: About Sito Wallet
about.body:
At Sito Wallet, we believe managing your money should be easy and stress-free. That's why we offer an app where you can manage all your accounts, both digital and physical, in one place.

Created with care by <2>sito8943, our mission is to help you understand and organize your finances clearly, safely, and without complications.

And the best part: it's completely free. Because we believe having control over your money shouldn't cost you anything.

howTo.title: What you can do
howTo.body: With Sito Wallet, you have everything you need to fully control your finances, both digital and physical, thanks to its simple and powerful tools.

steps.title: Currencies
items: Edit their details when values change or if you want to update their name or symbol.
Delete the ones you no longer use to keep your app clean.
View all your currencies in one place to know which currencies you are using.

steps.title: Accounts
items: Add physical accounts (cash, banks) or digital accounts (PayPal, cryptocurrencies).
Modify details such as initial balance, name, or account type.
View and organize all your accounts clearly.

steps.title: Transaction Categories
items: Create categories to organize your income and expenses (e.g., Food, Freelance Work).
Edit names and descriptions to match your way of classifying transactions.
List all categories to have an organized view of your finances.

steps.title: Transactions
items: Record income and expenses with all details (date, amount, category, account).
Edit transactions if you made a mistake or want to update information.
Check your history to analyze how and where your money is moving.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.body: Welcome to Sito Wallet. By downloading, accessing, or using our app, you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully.

sections.title: 1. About Sito Wallet
sections.body: Sito Wallet is a free application with the goal of helping you manage and organize your finances (digital and physical) in one place. The app provides tools to manage currencies, accounts, transaction categories, and transactions. Sito Wallet is offered completely free of charge.

sections.title: 2. Use of the Application
sections.body:
• You agree to use Sito Wallet only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms.
  • You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you add (accounts, transactions, balances, etc.).
  • The app is intended for personal finance management only and must not be used for illegal or fraudulent activities.

sections.title: 3. Data and Privacy
sections.body:
• Sito Wallet does not sell or share your personal financial data with third parties.
  • The information you enter remains under your control.
  • We may collect non-identifiable usage data to improve the app (such as errors or performance metrics).

sections.title: 4. No Financial Advice
sections.body: Sito Wallet provides tools to record and organize your money, but we do not provide financial, tax, or investment advice. Any decisions you make based on the information in the app are your sole responsibility.

sections.title: 5. Changes and Updates
sections.body:
• We may update or improve the app from time to time.
  • We may also update these Terms. If we do, we will notify users with the new version.
  • By continuing to use the app after updates, you agree to the new Terms.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: The app is provided “as is” and “as available”. We do not guarantee that the app will always work without interruptions, errors, or bugs. We are not responsible for any financial loss or damage resulting from the use of the app.

sections.title: 7. Termination of Use
sections.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the app if you misuse it, violate the Terms, or use it for unlawful activities.

sections.title: 8. Governing Law
sections.body: These Terms shall be governed by and interpreted according to the laws of Spain.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookies Policy
cookiesPolicy.body:
This policy explains how Sito Wallet uses cookies and similar technologies when you use the app.

At this stage, we prioritize technical storage required for sign-in, preferences, and offline functionality. A complete legal version will be published with additional details and controls.

sections.title: 1. What we store in your browser
sections.body:
• Local Storage for session and app preferences.
  • IndexedDB for offline data and sync queues.
  • Technical identifiers and metadata required to keep synchronization working correctly.

sections.title: 2. Purpose of this storage
sections.body:
• Keep you signed in and restore your session.
  • Allow the app to work in offline mode and synchronize changes later.
  • Remember some interface preferences to improve your experience.

sections.title: 3. Third-party cookies
sections.body: We do not enable advertising cookies in this frontend by default. If non-essential third-party cookies are introduced in the future, this policy and the consent flow will be updated before activation.

sections.title: 4. How to manage and revoke consent
sections.body: You can clear or block cookies and local data using your browser settings. We will also provide an in-app cookie preferences entry point in upcoming updates so revocation is as easy as acceptance.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.body:
This policy summarizes how Sito Wallet processes personal data when you use the app.

This is an initial operational version and will be expanded in the next legal review phase with full legal details.

sections.title: 1. Data we process
sections.body:
• Account data such as username and email.
  • Profile data, including optional profile photo if you upload one.
  • Financial data you create in the app (accounts, categories, transactions, balances).
  • Technical sync data such as device identifiers and synchronization metadata.

sections.title: 2. Why we process your data
sections.body:
• Provide core app features and maintain your account session.
  • Enable offline mode and synchronize your pending changes.
  • Improve reliability and diagnose technical issues.

sections.title: 3. Where data is stored
sections.body: Data can be stored on our backend and also locally in your browser through localStorage and IndexedDB to support persistence and offline functionality.

sections.title: 4. Sharing and transfers
sections.body: We do not sell your personal financial data. Data may be processed by technical providers needed to operate the service infrastructure.

sections.title: 5. Your rights
sections.body: You can request access, rectification, or deletion of your personal data and object to certain processing operations. For privacy requests, use the contact channel available at sito8943.com.
